programs.name: Lower Body & Unilateral Power
programs.description: 12-week program for David focused on RDL strength progression and unilateral upper body work within his left shoulder impingement restrictions. Target: RDL 205 lbs and single-arm cable press 40 lbs by block end.

program_json.summary: A 12-week strength program for David that targets elite lower body hinge strength (RDL to 205 lbs) while building unilateral upper body pushing patterns safe within his left shoulder impingement restrictions. Periodized in 3 phases: foundation (W1–4), progressive overload (W5–8), and strength peak (W9–12).

weeks.theme: RDL Baseline — establish hinge loads and shoulder boundaries

sessions.label: Week 1 Day A
sessions.focus: Baseline assessment — RDL and horizontal upper patterns

sessions.label: Week 1 Day B
sessions.focus: Lower body hinge progression + horizontal push-pull

weeks.theme: Volume Build — add RDL and unilateral upper work

sessions.label: Week 2 Day A
sessions.focus: Upper-lower split — RDL progression and single-leg intro

sessions.label: Week 2 Day B
sessions.focus: Hip hinge strength + unilateral lower body introduction

sessions.label: Week 3 Day A
sessions.focus: Strength block — RDL near-max and superset efficiency

sessions.label: Week 3 Day B
sessions.focus: Volume day — increase total lower body and pull work

weeks.theme: Hip Hinge Peak — RDL near-max and lower body volume

sessions.label: Week 4 Day A
sessions.focus: End-of-year strength assessment — push load ceilings

sessions.label: Week 4 Day B
sessions.focus: New year strength block — RDL plateau break

sessions.label: Week 5 Day A
sessions.focus: RDL consolidation at 185 lbs + upper body volume push

sessions.label: Week 5 Day B
sessions.focus: RDL PR attempt at 195 lbs + upper body strength peak

weeks.theme: Volume Day — density and upper body work

sessions.label: Week 6 Day A
sessions.focus: RDL 200 lbs milestone attempt

sessions.label: Week 6 Day B
sessions.focus: Unilateral upper body volume — cable work

sessions.label: Week 7 Day A
sessions.focus: RDL 200 lbs consolidation + single-arm press intro

sessions.label: Week 7 Day B
sessions.focus: Upper body pull peak — cable row and single-arm focus

weeks.theme: New Block — RDL plateau break and upper strength

sessions.label: Week 8 Day A
sessions.focus: RDL 195 lbs + single-arm cable press 35 lbs

sessions.label: Week 8 Day B
sessions.focus: Lower body volume — Bulgarian split squat addition

weeks.theme: RDL Consolidation — 185 lbs and upper body volume push

sessions.label: Week 9 Day A
sessions.focus: RDL PR attempt — 205 lbs

sessions.label: Week 9 Day B
sessions.focus: Consolidation session — all loads maintained

weeks.theme: RDL PR Attempt — 195 lbs and upper body strength peak

sessions.label: Week 10 Day A
sessions.focus: RDL 205 lbs consolidation + overhead pressing prep

sessions.label: Week 10 Day B
sessions.focus: Single-arm cable press 40 lbs milestone

weeks.theme: 200 lbs milestone — RDL PR and unilateral upper

sessions.label: Week 11 Day A
sessions.focus: Full lower body peak + unilateral upper integration

sessions.label: Week 11 Day B
sessions.focus: Block assessment — program review and next goals

weeks.theme: Block Complete — consolidate and plan next cycle

sessions.label: Week 12 Day A
sessions.focus: Block complete — set new program targets

sessions.label: Week 12 Day B
sessions.focus: Recovery and mobility session
